hero.subtitle: 100% Open source based Physical AI Humanoid Robot Arm
hero.subtitle_desc: Reasonable price, Easy and fast purchase

showcase.title: Bimanual AI Ready
showcase.subtitle: Beyond Single Arm, Expand to Dual Arm Operations
showcase.desc_1: OpenArm is perfectly designed to be used in pairs.
showcase.desc_2: Utilize bimanual configuration to reproduce human-like complex tasks.
showcase.ideal_for: Ideal for reinforcement learning data collection and imitation learning research.

features.title: Why Choose OpenArm?
features.subtitle: Key technology combined into an open ecosystem

opensource.title: 100% Open Source Ecosystem
opensource.desc: Join our GitHub community. Explore and modify all hardware designs, firmware, and software stacks freely.

affordable.title: Ultimate Affordability
affordable.desc: Built with high-quality mass-produced components. Dramatically lowering the entry barrier for robotics research and education.

ai_ready.title: AI & Teleoperation Ready
ai_ready.desc: Optimized protocols for seamless integration with reinforcement learning environments and imitation learning.

bimanual.title: Optimized for Bimanual
bimanual.desc: Design tailored for dual-arm operation, expanding research possibilities from single-arm to human-like tasks.

lightweight.title: Incredibly Lightweight
lightweight.desc: The 5.5kg carbon fiber and aluminum structure ensures high payload while allowing easy movement by a single person.

can_fd.title: CAN-FD Real-time Control
can_fd.desc: 1kHz high-speed communication guarantees precise synchronization and instantaneous response for multi-joint control.

stats.title: Core Specifications
stats.subtitle: Libertron complies with the OpenArm standard specifications.

why_korea.title: Why Libertron?
why_korea.subtitle: Fastest shipping, most reliable technical support in Korea

manufacturing.title: Domestic Manufacturing & QA
manufacturing.desc: We directly inspect all parts, assemble, and conduct rigorous quality testing in Korea.

shipping.title: Immediate Shipping Available
shipping.desc: No overseas shipping delays. We operate a local inventory for fast delivery within Korea.

support.title: Direct Technical Support
support.desc: Say goodbye to frustrating English emails. We provide prompt A/S and technical support directly in Korean.

get_started.title: Start Creating with OpenArm
get_started.subtitle: Everything you need to build the future of AI robotics is ready.

contact.title: Require a Custom Quote?
contact.subtitle: For laboratories, corporate research centers, and B2B orders, please request a quote directly from our official distributor, Libertron.

footer.description: OpenArm is an open-source project. Libertron is the official distributor in Korea.
